title: analytics — cache keys + tags
description: Fan-out cache for active-providers-per-tenant + circuit-breaker state mirror + batch buffer + entitlement cache.

keys.description: Cache of active AnalyticsProviderConfig fan-out set per tenant. Read on every capture. Contents: array of { id, provider, enabled_event_types, sampling_rate, batch_config, circuit_breaker_state }.
Hot-path circuit-breaker state mirror. Prevents a DB read per dispatch. Written by AnalyticsProviderConfigObserver.updated + CircuitBreakerFailureListener.
Redis list of pending AnalyticsDelivery.id values awaiting batch flush. LPUSH on new delivery, RPOP-N on flush.
invalidatedBy: AnalyticsBatchFlushed event (specifically drains the batch's entries)

keys.description: Cache of AnalyticsIdentity.id (aid_...) keyed by anonymous_id. Prevents a DB read per incoming event bearing an anonymous_id.
Current-month event pool consumed. Fast-path check during CaptureAnalyticsEventJob. Reset at UTC month boundary.
Rolling 24h actual sampling rate per (provider, event_name). Written by SamplingRateReconcilerJob. Read by AnalyticsHighDropRateNotification threshold check.
Materialised funnel report. Cached to protect the DB from repeated funnel queries by the dashboard.
Materialised experiment results per (tenant, experiment_key). Refreshed on every AnalyticsExperimentAssigned event.
